items.title: How presenter's Messi error caused outrage in Argentina
items.summary: An Argentine TV presenter steps down after wrongly saying on air that Lionel Messi's father had died.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: New Zealand edge Ireland in thriller
items.summary: New Zealand beat Ireland by four runs in a match that goes to the final ball at the Women's T20 World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
